text.message: getting hammered by the robber lol

you will not keep army between me and orange long term

he builds a city its over faster
how am i the rob there
no one is givinf you pop at 7

i mathematically eliminated and getting hit lol
never thought I would get 5 settles w/o building a city in this set up lol

well u got a road and a dev out of it

if he didnt trade w u he could have the army
na he was never getting army because i auto lost without army
you getting double rb took all my settle spots
but I would have had the army if I didnt get those rbs
ya i know but if he didnt pop early i could have focused on getting settles down
yes i know but at least we could have competed for army
